note: Mambo Ministry Registry — the source of truth and the scrape allow-list. 'domains' is an explicit set of exact official hosts (NOT a wildcard); the crawler may only fetch from these hosts. Verified against each ministry's official site, June 2026.

ministries.name: Ministry of Information Communication Technology, Postal & Courier Services
ministries.mandate: Develops policies and strategies for ICT, telecommunications, postal and courier services; builds an enabling environment for a knowledge-based society; spearheads ICT regulatory frameworks; promotes ICT literacy; and oversees ICT parastatals. Home of the National ICT Policy, National Broadband Plan, Cyber & Data Protection framework, and the National AI Strategy.

contact.address: 76 Samora Machel Avenue, Bank Chambers Building, Harare

ministries.name: Ministry of Health and Child Care
ministries.mandate: Provides and regulates health services across Zimbabwe: hospitals and clinics, medicines, disease prevention and control, maternal and child health, immunisation, and public health policy. Oversees the national health workforce and health information.

contact.address: Kaguvi Building, 4th Floor, Central Avenue, Harare

ministries.name: Ministry of Home Affairs and Cultural Heritage
ministries.mandate: Maintains public order and security; manages migration and borders; provides civil registration and secure identity documents (national IDs, passports, birth/death/marriage certificates); regulates gaming and entertainment; and preserves national heritage and archives. Oversees the ZRP, Immigration, Central Registry and National Archives.

contact.address: 11th Floor, Mukwati Building, Cnr 4th Street & Selous Avenue, Harare

ministries.name: Ministry of Finance, Economic Development and Investment Promotion
ministries.mandate: Manages public finances and the national economy: formulates the National Budget, fiscal and tax policy; collects revenue through ZIMRA; coordinates economic development plans; mobilises domestic and international financing; and promotes investment and ease of doing business. Oversees the Reserve Bank, ZIMRA and the Mutapa Investment Fund.

contact.address: 3rd Floor, Block B, Mgandane Dlodlo Building (New Government Complex), Cnr Central Avenue & Simon V. Muzenda Street, Harare

ministries.name: Ministry of Primary and Secondary Education
ministries.mandate: Administers primary and secondary schooling: education policy, curriculum, pedagogy and assessment; Early Childhood Development (ECD); the running of all schools; and life-long and continuing education, sport, arts and culture.

contact.address: Ambassador House, Union Avenue (Kwame Nkrumah Avenue), Harare

ministries.name: Zimbabwe Revenue Authority (ZIMRA)
ministries.mandate: Revenue collection, tax administration, customs and excise, trade facilitation.

contact.address: ZIMRA House, Cnr Leopold Takawira St & Herbert Chitepo Ave, Harare

ministries.name: Zimbabwe School Examinations Council (ZIMSEC)
ministries.mandate: Administers national examinations at Grade 7, O-Level and A-Level; sets syllabi; issues certificates.

contact.address: Upper East Road, Mount Pleasant, Harare

ministries.name: Veritas Zimbabwe — Acts, Bills & Statutory Instruments
ministries.mandate: Independent publisher of Zimbabwean legislation: Acts of Parliament, Statutory Instruments, Bills, General Notices, and the Constitution. Provides public access to the law.

ministries.name: ZimLII — Zimbabwe Legal Information Institute (Case Law)
ministries.mandate: Free, public access to Zimbabwe case law and judgments from the Supreme Court, High Court, Constitutional Court, Labour Court, and Administrative Court. Part of the AfricanLII / Laws.Africa free-access-to-law network.
